mapper.sql: p.hotel_id as hotelId, p.hotel_code as hotelCode, p.hotel_name as hotelName, p.hotel_name_en as hotelNameEn, p.brand_name as brandName, p.star_level as starLevel, p.contact_name as contactName, p.contact_phone as contactPhone, p.contact_email as contactEmail, p.province_code as provinceCode, p.province_name as provinceName, p.city_code as cityCode, p.city_name as cityName, p.district_code as districtCode, p.district_name as districtName, p.address as address, p.longitude as longitude, p.latitude as latitude, p.cooperate_status as cooperateStatus, p.source_apply_id as sourceApplyId, p.sign_date as signDate, p.contract_start_date as contractStartDate, p.contract_end_date as contractEndDate, p.commission_mode as commissionMode, p.commission_rate as commissionRate, p.markup_rate as markupRate, p.bd_user_id as bdUserId, coalesce(p.bd_user_name, u.nick_name) as bdUserName, p.account_status as accountStatus, p.status_reason as statusReason, p.remark as remark, p.create_by as createBy, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_by as updateBy, p.update_time as updateTime, pr.hotel_logo as hotelLogo, pr.cover_image as coverImage, pr.hotel_desc as hotelDesc, pr.service_tags as serviceTags, pr.traffic_info as trafficInfo, pr.customer_service_time as customerServiceTime, pr.checkin_time as checkinTime, pr.checkout_time as checkoutTime, pr.child_policy as childPolicy, pr.pet_policy as petPolicy, pr.cancel_policy as cancelPolicy, pr.sale_status as saleStatus, pr.sync_time as syncTime, ifnull(mo.monthly_order_count, 0) as monthlyOrderCount, ifnull(mo.monthly_sale_amount, 0) as monthlySaleAmount

from hotel_partner p left join hotel_profile pr on p.hotel_id = pr.hotel_id and pr.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user u on p.bd_user_id = u.user_id left join ( select hotel_id, count(1) as monthly_order_count, ifnull(sum(order_amount), 0) as monthly_sale_amount from hotel_order where del_flag = '0' and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') group by hotel_id ) mo on p.hotel_id = mo.hotel_id where p.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select id as id, apply_no as applyNo, hotel_name as hotelName, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, province_code as provinceCode, province_name as provinceName, city_code as cityCode, city_name as cityName, district_code as districtCode, district_name as districtName, address as address, longitude as longitude, latitude as latitude, business_license_files as businessLicenseFiles, special_license_files as specialLicenseFiles, health_license_files as healthLicenseFiles, apply_remark as applyRemark, apply_status as applyStatus, applicant_id as applicantId, applicant_name as applicantName, apply_time as applyTime, audit_time as auditTime, audit_user_id as auditUserId, audit_user_name as auditUserName, reject_reason as rejectReason, partner_hotel_id as partnerHotelId, last_operate_time as lastOperateTime, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_pending_apply where del_flag = '0' and hotel_name like concat('%', #{hotelName}, '%') and apply_status = #{applyStatus} and date_format(apply_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= #{beginApplyTime} and date_format(apply_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= #{endApplyTime} order by apply_time desc

select id as id, apply_no as applyNo, hotel_name as hotelName, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, province_code as provinceCode, province_name as provinceName, city_code as cityCode, city_name as cityName, district_code as districtCode, district_name as districtName, address as address, longitude as longitude, latitude as latitude, business_license_files as businessLicenseFiles, special_license_files as specialLicenseFiles, health_license_files as healthLicenseFiles, apply_remark as applyRemark, apply_status as applyStatus, applicant_id as applicantId, applicant_name as applicantName, apply_time as applyTime, audit_time as auditTime, audit_user_id as auditUserId, audit_user_name as auditUserName, reject_reason as rejectReason, partner_hotel_id as partnerHotelId, last_operate_time as lastOperateTime, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_pending_apply where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_pending_apply( apply_no, hotel_name, contact_name, contact_phone, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, address, longitude, latitude, business_license_files, special_license_files, health_license_files, apply_remark, apply_status, applicant_id, applicant_name, apply_time, last_operate_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{applyNo}, #{hotelName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{provinceCode}, #{provinceName}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{districtCode}, #{districtName}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{businessLicenseFiles}, #{specialLicenseFiles}, #{healthLicenseFiles}, #{applyRemark}, #{applyStatus}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{applyTime}, #{lastOperateTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select id as id, apply_id as applyId, operate_type as operateType, operate_user_id as operateUserId, operate_user_name as operateUserName, operate_remark as operateRemark, operate_time as operateTime from hotel_pending_audit_log where apply_id = #{applyId} and del_flag = '0' order by operate_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_partner( hotel_code, hotel_name, hotel_name_en, brand_name, star_level, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, address, longitude, latitude, cooperate_status, source_apply_id, sign_date, contract_start_date, contract_end_date, commission_mode, commission_rate, markup_rate, bd_user_id, account_status, status_reason, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{hotelCode}, #{hotelName}, #{hotelNameEn}, #{brandName}, #{starLevel}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{provinceCode}, #{provinceName}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{districtCode}, #{districtName}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{cooperateStatus}, #{sourceApplyId}, #{signDate}, #{contractStartDate}, #{contractEndDate}, #{commissionMode}, #{commissionRate}, #{markupRate}, #{bdUserId}, #{accountStatus}, #{statusReason}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when p.cooperate_status = 'NORMAL' then 1 else 0 end) as normalCount, sum(case when date_format(p.create_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') then 1 else 0 end) as monthlyNewCount, ifnull(sum(mo.monthly_sale_amount), 0) as monthlySalesAmount from hotel_partner p left join ( select hotel_id, ifnull(sum(order_amount), 0) as monthly_sale_amount from hotel_order where del_flag = '0' and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') group by hotel_id ) mo on p.hotel_id = mo.hotel_id where p.del_flag = '0'

select id as id, hotel_id as hotelId, contract_no as contractNo, contract_name as contractName, contract_file_ids as contractFileIds, contract_start_date as contractStartDate, contract_end_date as contractEndDate, commission_mode as commissionMode, commission_rate as commissionRate, markup_rate as markupRate, contract_status as contractStatus, sign_user_id as signUserId, sign_user_name as signUserName, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_contract where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and del_flag = '0' order by id desc

select id as id, hotel_id as hotelId, contract_no as contractNo, contract_name as contractName, contract_file_ids as contractFileIds, contract_start_date as contractStartDate, contract_end_date as contractEndDate, commission_mode as commissionMode, commission_rate as commissionRate, markup_rate as markupRate, contract_status as contractStatus, sign_user_id as signUserId, sign_user_name as signUserName from hotel_contract where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and del_flag = '0' order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_contract( hotel_id, contract_no, contract_name, contract_file_ids, contract_start_date, contract_end_date, commission_mode, commission_rate, markup_rate, contract_status, sign_user_id, sign_user_name, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{hotelId}, #{contractNo}, #{contractName}, #{contractFileIds}, #{contractStartDate}, #{contractEndDate}, #{commissionMode}, #{commissionRate}, #{markupRate}, #{contractStatus}, #{signUserId}, #{signUserName}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.update:
update hotel_contract
contract_name = #{contractName}, contract_file_ids = #{contractFileIds}, contract_start_date = #{contractStartDate}, contract_end_date = #{contractEndDate}, commission_mode = #{commissionMode}, commission_rate = #{commissionRate}, markup_rate = #{markupRate}, contract_status = #{contractStatus}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select id as id, hotel_id as hotelId, sys_user_id as sysUserId, account_type as accountType, account_name as accountName, nick_name as nickName, mobile as mobile, email as email, role_names as roleNames, account_status as accountStatus, last_login_time as lastLoginTime, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_account where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and del_flag = '0' order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_account( hotel_id, sys_user_id, account_type, account_name, nick_name, mobile, email, role_names, account_status, last_login_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{hotelId}, #{sysUserId}, #{accountType}, #{accountName}, #{nickName}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{roleNames}, #{accountStatus}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.update:
update hotel_account
account_name = #{accountName}, nick_name = #{nickName}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, role_names = #{roleNames}, account_status = #{accountStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select b.id as id, b.hotel_id as hotelId, p.hotel_name as hotelName, b.bd_user_id as bdUserId, coalesce(b.bd_user_name, u.nick_name) as bdUserName, u.user_name as bdUserCode, b.bind_status as bindStatus, b.bind_time as bindTime, b.unbind_time as unbindTime, b.remark as remark from hotel_bd_bind b left join hotel_partner p on b.hotel_id = p.hotel_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user u on b.bd_user_id = u.user_id where b.del_flag = '0' and p.hotel_name like concat('%', #{hotelName}, '%') and (u.nick_name like concat('%', #{bdUserName}, '%') or u.user_name like concat('%', #{bdUserName}, '%')) and b.bind_status = #{bindStatus} order by b.bind_time desc

select b.id as id, b.hotel_id as hotelId, p.hotel_name as hotelName, b.bd_user_id as bdUserId, coalesce(b.bd_user_name, u.nick_name) as bdUserName, u.user_name as bdUserCode, b.bind_status as bindStatus, b.bind_time as bindTime, b.unbind_time as unbindTime, b.remark as remark from hotel_bd_bind b left join hotel_partner p on b.hotel_id = p.hotel_id left join sys_user u on b.bd_user_id = u.user_id where b.id in
#{id}

select id as id, hotel_id as hotelId, bd_user_id as bdUserId, bd_user_name as bdUserName, bind_status as bindStatus, bind_time as bindTime, unbind_time as unbindTime, remark as remark from hotel_bd_bind where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and bind_status = 'BOUND' and del_flag = '0' order by id desc limit 1

select h.id as id, h.hotel_id as hotelId, p.hotel_name as hotelName, h.old_bd_user_id as oldBdUserId, h.old_bd_user_name as oldBdUserName, h.new_bd_user_id as newBdUserId, h.new_bd_user_name as newBdUserName, h.operate_type as operateType, h.operate_reason as operateReason, h.operate_user_id as operateUserId, h.operate_user_name as operateUserName, h.operate_time as operateTime from hotel_bd_bind_history h left join hotel_partner p on h.hotel_id = p.hotel_id where h.del_flag = '0' order by h.operate_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_bd_bind_history( hotel_id, old_bd_user_id, old_bd_user_name, new_bd_user_id, new_bd_user_name, operate_type, operate_reason, operate_user_id, operate_user_name, operate_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{hotelId}, #{oldBdUserId}, #{oldBdUserName}, #{newBdUserId}, #{newBdUserName}, #{operateType}, #{operateReason}, #{operateUserId}, #{operateUserName}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select u.user_id as id, u.nick_name as label, u.user_name as subLabel, '' as extra from sys_user u where u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0' and (u.nick_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by u.user_id desc

select hotel_id as id, hotel_name as label, bd_user_name as subLabel, cooperate_status as extra from hotel_partner where del_flag = '0' and hotel_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by hotel_id desc

select
and p.city_name like concat('%', #{cityName}, '%') and pr.sale_status = #{saleStatus} and pr.service_tags like concat('%', #{serviceTags}, '%') order by p.update_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_profile( hotel_id, hotel_logo, cover_image, hotel_desc, service_tags, traffic_info, customer_service_time, checkin_time, checkout_time, child_policy, pet_policy, cancel_policy, sale_status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{hotelId}, #{hotelLogo}, #{coverImage}, #{hotelDesc}, #{serviceTags}, #{trafficInfo}, #{customerServiceTime}, #{checkinTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{childPolicy}, #{petPolicy}, #{cancelPolicy}, #{saleStatus}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.update:
update hotel_profile
hotel_logo = #{hotelLogo}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, hotel_desc = #{hotelDesc}, service_tags = #{serviceTags}, traffic_info = #{trafficInfo}, customer_service_time = #{customerServiceTime}, checkin_time = #{checkinTime}, checkout_time = #{checkoutTime}, child_policy = #{childPolicy}, pet_policy = #{petPolicy}, cancel_policy = #{cancelPolicy}, sale_status = #{saleStatus}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select id as id, hotel_id as hotelId, image_type as imageType, image_url as imageUrl, image_name as imageName, sort_num as sortNum, remark as remark from hotel_profile_image where hotel_id = #{hotelId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_num asc, id asc
mapper.delete: update hotel_profile_image set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where hotel_id = #{hotelId}
mapper.select: select l.id as id, l.apply_id as applyId, l.operate_type as operateType, l.operate_user_id as operateUserId, l.operate_user_name as operateUserName, l.operate_remark as operateRemark, l.operate_time as operateTime from hotel_partner p inner join hotel_pending_audit_log l on p.source_apply_id = l.apply_id where p.hotel_id = #{hotelId} and l.del_flag = '0' order by l.operate_time desc

select r.id as id, r.hotel_id as hotelId, p.hotel_name as hotelName, r.room_type_code as roomTypeCode, r.room_type_name as roomTypeName, r.room_type_name_en as roomTypeNameEn, r.adult_count as adultCount, r.child_count as childCount, r.bed_type as bedType, r.bed_desc as bedDesc, r.area_size as areaSize, r.window_status as windowStatus, r.bathroom_type as bathroomType, r.is_smoking as isSmoking, r.is_breakfast as isBreakfast, r.cover_image as coverImage, r.room_desc as roomDesc, r.default_refund_rule as defaultRefundRule, r.min_booking_rooms as minBookingRooms, r.max_booking_rooms as maxBookingRooms, r.min_booking_nights as minBookingNights, r.max_booking_nights as maxBookingNights, r.sale_status as saleStatus, r.sort_num as sortNum, r.remark as remark, r.create_by as createBy, r.create_time as createTime, r.update_by as updateBy, r.update_time as updateTime from hotel_room_type r left join hotel_partner p on r.hotel_id = p.hotel_id where r.del_flag = '0' and r.hotel_id = #{hotelId} and r.room_type_name like concat('%', #{roomTypeName}, '%') and r.sale_status = #{saleStatus} order by r.sort_num asc, r.id desc

select id as id, hotel_id as hotelId, room_type_code as roomTypeCode, room_type_name as roomTypeName, room_type_name_en as roomTypeNameEn, adult_count as adultCount, child_count as childCount, bed_type as bedType, bed_desc as bedDesc, area_size as areaSize, window_status as windowStatus, bathroom_type as bathroomType, is_smoking as isSmoking, is_breakfast as isBreakfast, cover_image as coverImage, room_desc as roomDesc, default_refund_rule as defaultRefundRule, min_booking_rooms as minBookingRooms, max_booking_rooms as maxBookingRooms, min_booking_nights as minBookingNights, max_booking_nights as maxBookingNights, sale_status as saleStatus, sort_num as sortNum, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_room_type where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_room_type( hotel_id, room_type_code, room_type_name, room_type_name_en, adult_count, child_count, bed_type, bed_desc, area_size, window_status, bathroom_type, is_smoking, is_breakfast, cover_image, room_desc, default_refund_rule, min_booking_rooms, max_booking_rooms, min_booking_nights, max_booking_nights, sale_status, sort_num, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{hotelId}, #{roomTypeCode}, #{roomTypeName}, #{roomTypeNameEn}, #{adultCount}, #{childCount}, #{bedType}, #{bedDesc}, #{areaSize}, #{windowStatus}, #{bathroomType}, #{isSmoking}, #{isBreakfast}, #{coverImage}, #{roomDesc}, #{defaultRefundRule}, #{minBookingRooms}, #{maxBookingRooms}, #{minBookingNights}, #{maxBookingNights}, #{saleStatus}, #{sortNum}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select id as id, room_type_id as roomTypeId, image_url as imageUrl, image_name as imageName, sort_num as sortNum, remark as remark from hotel_room_type_image where room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_num asc, id asc
mapper.delete: update hotel_room_type_image set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where room_type_id = #{roomTypeId}
mapper.select: select id as id, hotel_id as hotelId, room_type_id as roomTypeId, biz_date as bizDate, week_no as weekNo, settlement_price as settlementPrice, sale_price as salePrice, commission_rate as commissionRate, commission_amount as commissionAmount, inventory as inventory, room_status as roomStatus, refund_rule as refundRule, special_tag as specialTag, is_default_data as isDefaultData from hotel_room_calendar where room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} and biz_date = #{bizDate} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_room_calendar( hotel_id, room_type_id, biz_date, week_no, settlement_price, sale_price, commission_rate, commission_amount, inventory, room_status, refund_rule, special_tag, is_default_data, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{hotelId}, #{roomTypeId}, #{bizDate}, #{weekNo}, #{settlementPrice}, #{salePrice}, #{commissionRate}, #{commissionAmount}, #{inventory}, #{roomStatus}, #{refundRule}, #{specialTag}, #{isDefaultData}, #{remark}, '', now(), '', now(), '0' )
mapper.update: update hotel_room_calendar set settlement_price = #{settlementPrice}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, commission_rate = #{commissionRate}, commission_amount = #{commissionAmount}, inventory = #{inventory}, room_status = #{roomStatus}, refund_rule = #{refundRule}, special_tag = #{specialTag}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_room_calendar_log( calendar_id, hotel_id, room_type_id, biz_date, operate_type, before_json, after_json, operate_user_id, operate_user_name, operate_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{calendarId}, #{hotelId}, #{roomTypeId}, #{bizDate}, #{operateType}, #{beforeJson}, #{afterJson}, #{operateUserId}, #{operateUserName}, now(), #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select l.id as id, l.calendar_id as calendarId, l.hotel_id as hotelId, p.hotel_name as hotelName, l.room_type_id as roomTypeId, r.room_type_name as roomTypeName, l.biz_date as bizDate, l.operate_type as operateType, l.before_json as beforeJson, l.after_json as afterJson, l.operate_user_id as operateUserId, l.operate_user_name as operateUserName, l.operate_time as operateTime, l.remark as remark from hotel_room_calendar_log l left join hotel_partner p on l.hotel_id = p.hotel_id left join hotel_room_type r on l.room_type_id = r.id where l.del_flag = '0' and l.hotel_id = #{hotelId} and l.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} order by l.operate_time desc

select id as id, order_no as orderNo, hotel_id as hotelId, hotel_name as hotelName, room_type_id as roomTypeId, room_type_name as roomTypeName, user_id as userId, user_name as userName, user_mobile as userMobile, bd_user_id as bdUserId, checkin_date as checkinDate, checkout_date as checkoutDate, night_count as nightCount, room_count as roomCount, order_amount as orderAmount, tax_amount as taxAmount, discount_amount as discountAmount, pay_amount as payAmount, refund_amount as refundAmount, order_status as orderStatus, refund_status as refundStatus, refund_reason as refundReason, special_request as specialRequest, inner_remark as innerRemark, confirm_time as confirmTime, checkin_time as checkinTime, checkout_time as checkoutTime, cancel_time as cancelTime, cancel_reason as cancelReason, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_order where order_no = #{orderNo} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select id as id, order_id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, guest_name as guestName, guest_mobile as guestMobile, certificate_type as certificateType, certificate_no as certificateNo, is_main_guest as isMainGuest, remark as remark from hotel_order_guest where order_no = #{orderNo} and del_flag = '0' order by id asc

select id as id, order_id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, operate_type as operateType, before_status as beforeStatus, after_status as afterStatus, operate_user_id as operateUserId, operate_user_name as operateUserName, operate_remark as operateRemark, operate_time as operateTime from hotel_order_log where order_no = #{orderNo} and del_flag = '0' order by operate_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_order_log( order_id, order_no, operate_type, before_status, after_status, operate_user_id, operate_user_name, operate_remark, operate_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{operateType}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{operateUserId}, #{operateUserName}, #{operateRemark}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select id as id, bill_no as billNo, hotel_id as hotelId, hotel_name as hotelName, statement_start_date as statementStartDate, statement_end_date as statementEndDate, order_count as orderCount, room_night_count as roomNightCount, total_room_amount as totalRoomAmount, total_commission_amount as totalCommissionAmount, total_settlement_amount as totalSettlementAmount, bill_status as billStatus, dispute_status as disputeStatus, confirm_time as confirmTime, confirm_user_id as confirmUserId, confirm_user_name as confirmUserName, payment_status as paymentStatus, generate_mode as generateMode, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_bill where del_flag = '0' and hotel_id = #{hotelId} and bill_status = #{billStatus} and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= #{beginCreateTime} and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= #{endCreateTime} order by create_time desc

select id as id, bill_no as billNo, hotel_id as hotelId, hotel_name as hotelName, statement_start_date as statementStartDate, statement_end_date as statementEndDate, order_count as orderCount, room_night_count as roomNightCount, total_room_amount as totalRoomAmount, total_commission_amount as totalCommissionAmount, total_settlement_amount as totalSettlementAmount, bill_status as billStatus, dispute_status as disputeStatus, confirm_time as confirmTime, confirm_user_id as confirmUserId, confirm_user_name as confirmUserName, payment_status as paymentStatus, generate_mode as generateMode, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_bill where bill_no = #{billNo} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_bill( bill_no, hotel_id, hotel_name, statement_start_date, statement_end_date, order_count, room_night_count, total_room_amount, total_commission_amount, total_settlement_amount, bill_status, dispute_status, confirm_time, confirm_user_id, confirm_user_name, payment_status, generate_mode, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{billNo}, #{hotelId}, #{hotelName}, #{statementStartDate}, #{statementEndDate}, #{orderCount}, #{roomNightCount}, #{totalRoomAmount}, #{totalCommissionAmount}, #{totalSettlementAmount}, #{billStatus}, #{disputeStatus}, #{confirmTime}, #{confirmUserId}, #{confirmUserName}, #{paymentStatus}, #{generateMode}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select id as id, bill_id as billId, bill_no as billNo, order_id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, hotel_id as hotelId, room_type_id as roomTypeId, room_type_name as roomTypeName, checkin_date as checkinDate, checkout_date as checkoutDate, night_count as nightCount, order_amount as orderAmount, commission_amount as commissionAmount, settlement_amount as settlementAmount, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_bill_order where bill_no = #{billNo} and del_flag = '0' and order_no = #{orderNo} order by id desc
mapper.delete: update hotel_bill_order set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where bill_no = #{billNo}
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_bill_order( bill_id, bill_no, order_id, order_no, hotel_id, room_type_id, room_type_name, checkin_date, checkout_date, night_count, order_amount, commission_amount, settlement_amount, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{hotelId}, #{roomTypeId}, #{roomTypeName}, #{checkinDate}, #{checkoutDate}, #{nightCount}, #{orderAmount}, #{commissionAmount}, #{settlementAmount}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select id as id, bill_id as billId, bill_no as billNo, operate_type as operateType, operate_user_id as operateUserId, operate_user_name as operateUserName, operate_remark as operateRemark, operate_time as operateTime from hotel_bill_check_log where bill_no = #{billNo} and del_flag = '0' order by operate_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_bill_check_log( bill_id, bill_no, operate_type, operate_user_id, operate_user_name, operate_remark, operate_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{operateType}, #{operateUserId}, #{operateUserName}, #{operateRemark}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select id as id, bill_id as billId, bill_no as billNo, payment_no as paymentNo, payment_amount as paymentAmount, payment_status as paymentStatus, payment_time as paymentTime, voucher_file_ids as voucherFileIds, invoice_title as invoiceTitle, invoice_tax_no as invoiceTaxNo, bank_account_name as bankAccountName, bank_name as bankName, bank_account_no as bankAccountNo, apply_user_id as applyUserId, apply_user_name as applyUserName, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_bill_payment where bill_no = #{billNo} and del_flag = '0' order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_bill_payment( bill_id, bill_no, payment_no, payment_amount, payment_status, payment_time, voucher_file_ids, invoice_title, invoice_tax_no, bank_account_name, bank_name, bank_account_no, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{billId}, #{billNo}, #{paymentNo}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentTime}, #{voucherFileIds}, #{invoiceTitle}, #{invoiceTaxNo}, #{bankAccountName}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccountNo}, #{applyUserId}, #{applyUserName}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
mapper.select: select id as id, config_key as configKey, config_name as configName, config_group as configGroup, config_value as configValue, config_type as configType, status as status, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_business_config where del_flag = '0' order by config_group asc, id asc

select id as id, config_key as configKey, config_name as configName, config_group as configGroup, config_value as configValue, config_type as configType, status as status, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_business_config where config_key = #{configKey} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select id as id, config_id as configId, config_key as configKey, before_value as beforeValue, after_value as afterValue, operate_user_id as operateUserId, operate_user_name as operateUserName, operate_time as operateTime, remark as remark, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime from hotel_business_config_log where del_flag = '0' order by operate_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_business_config_log( config_id, config_key, before_value, after_value, operate_user_id, operate_user_name, operate_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{configId}, #{configKey}, #{beforeValue}, #{afterValue}, #{operateUserId}, #{operateUserName}, now(), #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), '0' )
